description: Vertical graphic. The top third is a photograph of President Trump (in a dark navy suit, red-and-white striped tie) standing and clapping, beside a worker in a green jacket and an orange/yellow hard hat (marked with a name); other workers in orange hard hats are partly visible at the edges. The lower two-thirds has a deep navy background with a faint DOL seal watermark. A large white serif headline reads 'The President of THE AMERICAN WORKER' ('The President of' in italic, 'THE AMERICAN WORKER' in bold caps). A gray ribbon banner beneath reads 'President Trump has delivered:'. Below is a two-column checklist, each item with a checkbox and white serif caps text: NO TAX ON TIPS; SOCIAL SECURITY TAX CUTS; NO TAX ON OVERTIME; EXPANDED CHILD TAX CREDIT; PELL GRANTS FOR SKILLED TRADES; INCREASED BLUE-COLLAR WAGES; REDUCED REGULATIONS ON SMALL BUSINESSES; 300,000 NEW APPRENTICES ACROSS OUR NATION; AMERICAN JOB GAINS; HISTORIC ECONOMIC GROWTH; FINANCIAL FREEDOM IN 401(K) INVESTMENTS; COMMITMENT TO 'MADE IN AMERICA'; HISTORIC FAIR TRADE DEALS; PROTECTION OF AMERICAN JOBS. A small DOL seal is centered at the bottom.
notable_text: The President of THE AMERICAN WORKER; President Trump has delivered:; No Tax on Tips; Social Security Tax Cuts; No Tax on Overtime; Pell Grants for Skilled Trades; 300,000 New Apprentices; Made in America; Protection of American Jobs
